title: Inquiry About Retrieving Conversation Replies via the monday.com API
excerpt: I want to retrieve the replies in conversations. Is there a way to do this through the monday.com API? Perhaps by passing the board URL and ID?

posts.author: jingtung (jingtung)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to retrieve the replies in conversations. Is there a way to do this through the monday.com API? Perhaps by passing the board URL and ID?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @jingtung and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

You can use a query like this one to get the IDs of the updates in an item:

{
  items(ids: 1234567890) {
    updates {
      id
      body
      replies {
        body
        id
      }
    }
  }
}

I hope that helps!

Cheers,
Matias
